audit_scope: strict claim/evidence traceability only; not peer review, scientific correctness, independent replication, statistical power, semantic output quality, citation accuracy, or human-written status

claims.claim: The GB10 audit bundle selected Dense Router Retrofit as the featured artifact because it was the highest-scoring locally inspectable positive Enoch artifact found in the corpus scan.
The audit bundle decision is strict_pass with needs_review=false and disposition complete_evidence_backed_audit_bundle.

The strict audit bundle reports six of six audit criteria passed, including positive candidate selection, required artifact presence, metric support, negative small-shape calibration preservation, fresh live smoke execution, and GB10 memory posture.
The fresh GB10 live smoke reported executable correctness and a minimum builder speedup above 3x while preserving the limitation that small-shape speedup kill gates remain negative.

The audit notes preserve that this bundle is not full scientific closure: it does not rerun the full medium-shape benchmark and the selected Dense Router Retrofit artifact still needs real checkpoint/language-validation integration.

limitations: This project audits one featured existing Enoch artifact; it does not re-run the selected artifact full medium-shape benchmark because the audit target is bundle strictness, not new scientific benchmarking.
Fresh live smoke confirms executable correctness and GB10 path health, but intentionally uses tiny shapes where speedup kill gates remain negative as documented by the selected artifact.
The selected Dense Router Retrofit artifact still requires real checkpoint/language-validation integration for final model-quality closure.
This public corpus artifact is a curated audit bundle export; it is not a new peer-reviewed paper or independent replication.

selected_artifact.selection_rationale: Highest-scoring locally inspectable positive Enoch artifact in the corpus scan: executable code, GB10 logs, CSV/JSON metrics, run notes, and a positive non-review decision.
